description: Defines and exports all canonical lineage structures used across the platform. Lineage records trace artifact derivation — what produced each artifact, which module produced it, when, and what inputs it consumed. This is the single authoritative source for lineage primitives.
forbidden_responsibilities: Artifact model schemas — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Provenance records — those are owned by shared.provenance
Readiness state definitions — those are owned by shared.readiness
Evaluation logic — that belongs to control_plane.evaluation
